landing.hero_subtitle: Yucatecan company specialized in the production of high-quality organic honey, with direct online sales nationwide. We offer natural, traceable products of 100% peninsular origin, bringing the best honey directly to your home.

values.title: What defines us
values.description: Each cell in our hive represents a principle that guides our decisions, processes, and relationship with customers.
values.quality_desc: Natural honey with processes that ensure purity and safety.
values.responsibility_desc: We act with ethics, transparency, and care for the environment.
values.client_desc: We offer reliable and healthy products that meet customer expectations.
values.teamwork_desc: We collaborate to achieve sustainable, high-quality results.
values.origin_desc: We value beekeeping traditions and local communities.
values.innovation_desc: We use technology and e-commerce to improve processes and sales.
values.sustainability_desc: We protect bees and the ecosystem.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.body: Our headquarters are in Merida, Yucatan, a city recognized for its culture and beekeeping tradition. From here, we coordinate logistics, certifications, and export operations, ensuring every jar reaches its destination with top quality. Our team is always available to provide personalized support, answer questions, and assist national and international clients throughout the export process. Visit us or get in touch to learn more about our products and services.
contact.address_value: C. 21 LB, Villas Merida, 97288 Merida, Yucatan, Mexico

about.title: Our essence
about.description: Yucatecan company specialized in the production and online sale of high-quality honey, combining beekeeping tradition, technology, and commitment to sustainability in the national market.
about.history_body: Honey Bee is a Yucatecan company founded by Lorem Ipsum dolor Admet, dedicated to the production and online sale of high-quality honey, combining beekeeping tradition, technology, and commitment to sustainability in the national market.
about.mission_body: To offer high-quality Mexican natural honey through digital platforms and e-commerce, guaranteeing purity, flavor, and nutritional value, while supporting local beekeepers and promoting sustainable practices that protect bees and the environment.
about.vision_body: To establish ourselves as a leading company in the digital marketing and export of Mexican honey, recognized nationally and internationally for the excellence of our products, our presence in electronic markets, and our commitment to sustainability and technological innovation.
about.objectives_item_1: Expand digital presence to 5 new states in 2 years.
about.objectives_item_2: Increase sales by 20% annually through e-commerce.
about.objectives_item_3: Strengthen brand positioning in digital channels.
about.objectives_item_4: Forge alliances with online platforms and distributors.
